revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Off-topic thread]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Off-topic thread]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Off-topic thread]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Off-topic thread]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Off-topic thread]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Off-topic thread]]</includeonly>

{{Disregard|title=[[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#How to use article talk pages|Off-topic]]|1={{{reason|{{{result|{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Disregard|title=[[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#How to use article talk pages|Off-topic]]|1={{{reason|{{{result|{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Disregard|title=[[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#How to use article talk pages|Off-topic]]|1={{{reason|{{{result|{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Disregard|title=[[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#How to use article talk pages|Off-topic]]|1={{{reason|{{{result|{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Disregard|title=[[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#How to use article talk pages|Off-topic]]|1={{{reason|{{{result|{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Disregard|title=[[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#How to use article talk pages|Off-topic]]|1={{{reason|{{{result|{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
